caption: 玄关｜效果图 · 顶天立地鞋柜与感应灯带
prompt_en: Photorealistic interior design photograph, modern Chinese apartment entryway 120sqm, floor-to-ceiling shoe cabinet with middle niche and LED strip, light oak and white panels, soft daylight from side, clean minimalist, high detail, 8k
工序要点: 鞋柜深化图纸、强弱电点位避让、地面找平

caption: 玄关｜现场 · 强弱电开槽与鞋柜基层放线（中国板式户型玄关）
prompt_en: Photorealistic smartphone documentary photo: narrow entryway foyer typical Chinese slab-type apartment corridor under 1.4m wide feel, beige ceramic floor partly stripped to grey cement dust, yellow PVC electrical conduit along wall with fresh chase grooves for strong and weak current, chalk snap lines marking shoe cabinet footprint against load-bearing wall, temporary bare bulb light, messy buckets trowels ladder safety tape, distant glimpse of PVC-framed sliding glass door typical China developer flat, realistic muted tones not luxury showroom
工序要点: 线管弯径、点位与柜体厚度核对、地面标高移交

caption: 客厅｜效果图 · 电视背景墙与无主灯吊顶
prompt_en: Photorealistic living room interior, contemporary Chinese style, TV wall with wood slats and stone texture, recessed ceiling with magnetic track lights, cream sofa, warm ambient lighting, wide angle, 8k architectural visualization
工序要点: 吊顶龙骨验收、灯槽尺寸、电视预埋 PVC 管

caption: 客厅｜现场 · 地砖铺贴完成·成品保护膜
prompt_en: Photorealistic construction site photo, living room floor tiles just installed, cardboard protection film covering tiles, tools and buckets in corner, natural messy renovation stage, daylight through window, documentary style
工序要点: 地暖伸缩缝、十字卡铺砖、空鼓锤抽检

caption: 餐厅｜效果图 · 岛台一体餐桌与餐边柜
prompt_en: Photorealistic dining area open plan, island dining table integrated with kitchen side, pendant lights above table, sideboard with glass doors, warm wood tones, Nordic minimalist Chinese home, interior photography 8k
工序要点: 岛台电位、吊灯悬挂点结构加固

caption: 餐厅｜现场 · 地坪找平放样·吊顶吊杆定位（餐客一体常见户型）
prompt_en: Photorealistic renovation site photo: dining niche inside typical Chinese open-plan living-dining combo layout, compact rectangular room not Western mansion, grey cement floor before tiles with self-leveling marks and footprints, red laser level line projected on wall for suspended ceiling, galvanized ceiling hanger rods popped along slab for plasterboard ceiling, stacked gypsum boards and bags of mortar, sliding glass door to enclosed balcony typical China apartment, fluorescent tube temporary lighting, messy authentic jobsite smartphone documentary angle
工序要点: 餐边柜电位、吊灯悬挂点打孔避梁、地面平整度 2m 靠尺

caption: 厨房｜效果图 · U 型橱柜与高柜嵌入蒸烤箱
prompt_en: Photorealistic modern kitchen interior, U-shaped cabinets white and grey, quartz countertop, built-in oven stack, range hood, subway tile backsplash, bright LED under cabinet, Chinese apartment kitchen 8k
工序要点: 橱柜复尺、烟道止逆阀、水槽台下盆加固

caption: 厨房｜现场 · 墙砖铺贴·止逆阀安装节点
prompt_en: Photorealistic renovation photo, kitchen wall tiles half done, exhaust duct check valve visible, construction dust, realistic job site, smartphone photo quality
工序要点: 瓷砖泡水、下水坡度、燃气表移位合规

caption: 主卧｜效果图 · 床头背景墙与整墙衣柜
prompt_en: Photorealistic master bedroom, upholstered headboard wall panel, floor-to-ceiling wardrobe sliding doors, sheer curtains, carpet, calm beige palette, luxury simple Chinese interior render 8k
工序要点: 衣柜深化、床头柜插座高度、木地板自流平

caption: 主卧｜现场 · 腻子打磨完成·滚涂前粉尘清理
prompt_en: Photorealistic interior renovation, bedroom walls sanded smooth ready for paint, plastic floor protection, ladder and masking tape, realistic renovation documentary photo
工序要点: 石膏找平、阴阳角条、底漆封闭碱

caption: 次卧｜效果图 · 榻榻米书房兼客房
prompt_en: Photorealistic small bedroom study combo, tatami platform bed with storage, desk by window, bookshelf wall, light wood and white, cozy compact Chinese apartment room render 8k
工序要点: 榻榻米预留检修口、书桌护眼灯光位置

caption: 次卧｜现场 · 榻榻米木基层打底·检修口预留（紧凑次卧）
prompt_en: Photorealistic messy renovation documentary: compact secondary bedroom typical Chinese high-rise flat about 9 to 11 square meters footprint, tatami raised platform timber skeleton framing with plywood substrate exposed, rectangular inspection hatch opening clearly reserved in corner for floor heating manifold access, aluminium sliding window with security grille common China urban residential look, insulation foil along exterior wall visible, electric cables stapled neatly pending finishing, circular saw vacuum hose dust realistic, cramped proportions NOT American master suite
工序要点: 榻榻米检修口盖板、地暖分水器避让、窗台石衔接

caption: 卫生间｜效果图 · 干湿分离·壁挂马桶与淋浴玻璃
prompt_en: Photorealistic modern bathroom render, glass shower partition, wall hung toilet, floating vanity, large grey tiles, recessed ceiling waterproof LED, dry wet separation Chinese apartment 8k
工序要点: 防水涂刷高度、门槛石止水墩、二次排水

caption: 卫生间｜现场 · 防水第二遍·闭水试验前检查
prompt_en: Photorealistic construction detail photo, bathroom corner waterproof coating grey layer brush marks, floor drain visible, renovation documentary realistic lighting
工序要点: 48h 闭水、楼下顶棚渗漏巡检签字

caption: 卫生间｜整改 · 地漏周边二次找平坡度
prompt_en: Photorealistic close-up bathroom floor renovation, worker smoothing mortar slope toward floor drain, correction rework scene, documentary photo
工序要点: 排水试验、异响排查、下水配件更换记录

caption: 阳台｜效果图 · 家政柜与洗烘叠放
prompt_en: Photorealistic balcony laundry area design, tall cabinet for cleaning tools, stacked washer dryer, grey tiles floor, glass railing view, bright daylight interior render 8k
工序要点: 防水上翻、洗衣机地漏专用、电动晾衣架承重

caption: 阳台｜现场 · 窗框节点防水涂刷（封闭阳台·中国式晾晒家政区）
prompt_en: Photorealistic documentary smartphone photo: enclosed service balcony typical Chinese apartment sealed laundry balcony, aluminium alloy sliding windows with condensation tracks, stacked washer dryer corner wrapped in plastic film, grey matte floor tiles partly laid with spacers, worker wearing ordinary jacket brushing black waterproof coating along interior-side window sill and frame groove junction NOT dangling outside skyscraper, buckets rollers masking tape mop realistic renovation clutter, daylight through glazing showing neighboring slab facade typical China residential compound
工序要点: 发泡胶老化检查、硅酮耐候胶重打、滴水线恢复
